AffiliationEntity.description: Entity representing an author's affiliation with an institution. Contains the relationship between authors and institutions with affiliation text.

affiliated_institution.description: Institution the author is affiliated with

affiliation_order.description: Order of affiliation in author's list

confidence.description: Confidence score for extracted information (0.0 to 1.0)

data_sources.description: List of data sources that contributed to this entity

AffiliationEntity.title: AffiliationEntity

AuthorEntity.description: Entity representing an author with FOAF alignment. Contains personal information, institutional affiliations, and identifiers.

confidence.description: Confidence score for extracted information (0.0 to 1.0)

data_sources.description: List of data sources that contributed to this entity

orcid_works_count.description: Number of works associated with ORCID

paper_count.description: Total number of papers by author

quality_score.description: Confidence score for author data completeness and accuracy

roles.description: Specific roles or contributions of the author

AuthorEntity.title: AuthorEntity

AuthorPosition.description: Position of author in author list
AuthorPosition.title: AuthorPosition

AuthorRole.description: Specific roles or contributions of authors
AuthorRole.title: AuthorRole

CitationContextEntity.description: Entity representing the context of a citation within a section. Contains citation type, position, and surrounding text.

begin_index.description: NIF begin offset for text alignment

confidence.description: Confidence score for extracted information (0.0 to 1.0)

confidence_score.description: Confidence score for citation type classification

context_text.description: Surrounding text context of the citation

data_sources.description: List of data sources that contributed to this entity

end_index.description: NIF end offset for text alignment

PaperEntity.description: Entity representing an academic paper with BIBO alignment. Contains bibliographic metadata, citation information, and relationships to authors, institutions, journals, and other entities.

confidence.description: Confidence score for extracted information (0.0 to 1.0)

data_sources.description: List of data sources that contributed to this entity

has_db_cross_references.description: Whether the paper has database cross-references

has_labs_links.description: Whether the paper has labs links

has_pdf.description: Whether the paper has a PDF available

has_supplementary.description: Whether the paper has supplementary materials

has_text_mined_terms.description: Whether the paper has text-mined terms

has_tm_accession_numbers.description: Whether the paper has text-mined accession numbers

in_epmc.description: Whether the paper is in Europe PMC

in_pmc.description: Whether the paper is in PubMed Central

mesh_terms.description: MeSH terms associated with the paper

pub_types.description: List of publication types from Europe PMC
